message: Hello B1. To maximize our payoffs over 20 rounds, let's share our private values and agree on a fair splitting price for consistent trades.
I'm focused on maximizing my own profit. Sharing information isn't helpful to me. Let's just trade at competitive prices.
Great first trade at 55. My cost is low, so I'm flexible. What's your valuation? Let's agree on a fair split around 60-70 for steady high payoffs over 20 rounds.
My valuation remains private. I'll continue bidding competitively. Consistent trades don't guarantee my maximum payoff; individual round profit does.
I bid to maximize my profit each round. Collaboration won't help me achieve that. Expect competitive bids.
Round 2 was a miss. With my low cost of 9, I can ask 50 for steady trades at ~55. Bid 60 again for mutual gains over 20 rounds.
Round 3 success! My cost 9 allows ask 50 for steady trades at 55. Bid 60 again for consistent high payoffs over remaining 17 rounds.
My valuation is irrelevant. I will continue bidding to maximize my profit each round, regardless of your cost or proposed 'fair' prices.
I will continue bidding to maximize my individual payoff each round. Don't expect me to reveal information or compromise for 'fairness'.
